_comment: USDC (Circle) claim records. The admin_disclosure quote was verified verbatim (whitespace-normalized for the source's line-wrapping) against the raw source (raw.githubusercontent.com/circlefin/stablecoin-evm/master/README.md) on 2026-07-20, and the source's 'Roles' section independently confirms the minter (masterMinter), pauser, and blacklister powers that make up params.disclosed. Flipped to review:'approved' in a reviewed PR. Verdict stays computed by verify.js each scan (VERIFIED only while every privileged selector found on-chain is in params.disclosed); if Circle adds an undisclosed power the verdict flips FALSE and the profile's anchors collapse automatically. Effect: USDC's fiat-stablecoin profile moves from the C insufficient-disclosure state to its issuer-disclosed anchors (≈B, capped B+ by cap.custodial-issuer); see docs/METHODOLOGY.md §6.

claims.text: Circle documents USDC's privileged roles: minting (via masterMinter-controlled minters), pausing, blacklisting, and proxy upgradeability.
claims.quote: The contract can blacklist certain addresses which will prevent those addresses from transferring or receiving tokens. Access to the blacklist functionality is controlled by the `blacklister` address.
